case_title: HAQ, SALEEMA K. VS UNITED AIR LINES, INC. THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPOR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HAQ, SALEEMA K. AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.   THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPOR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CERT. RECEIPT TO UNITED AIRLINES RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAQ, SALEEMA K. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.   THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPOR. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIR LINES, INC.   THE PRENTICE-HALL CORPOR.
